rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative relationship to Educ. Code §61.0663, which governs the board's maintenance of an inventory of postsecondary programs for persons with intellectual and developmental disabilities.
quote: The board shall maintain an inventory of all postsecondary educational programs and services provided for persons with intellectual and developmental disabilities by institutions of higher education.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and this statute's subject matter.
